name: interest_rate_swap
description: Analyze a fixed-for-floating interest rate swap. Computes period-by-period cash flows, breakeven floating rate, rate scenario analysis, mark-to-market valuation (NPV of remaining net cash flows), and a swap recommendation. Supports monthly, quarterly, semi-annual, or annual payment frequencies.

notional_amount.description: Notional principal amount of the swap in dollars

floating_rate_current.description: Current floating reference rate as decimal (e.g. 0.04 = 4%)

floating_rate_spread.description: Spread over floating reference rate as decimal (e.g. 0.02 = 200bps)

rate_scenarios.description: Optional array of floating rates to stress-test

noi_annual.description: Optional annual NOI for DSCR-with-swap calculation
